title: Anthropic Model Safety Bug Bounty Program
description: Anthropic's ongoing Model Safety Bug Bounty Program rewards selected researchers for identifying qualifying universal jailbreaks in deployed model safeguards.
eligibility: Experienced AI security and safety researchers may apply for the HackerOne-hosted program; accepted participants must follow its scope, account, testing, and confidentiality requirements.
value: Bounties up to $35,000 for qualifying novel universal jailbreaks, plus authorized access to a testing model alias
regions: Global, subject to program availability and selection
